description: The Syrian Democratic Forces (SDF) is a Kurdish-led coalition of left-wing ethnic militias and rebel groups founded on 10 October 2015. It serves as the official military wing of the Democratic Autonomous Administration of North and East Syria (Rojava). The SDF aims to create a secular, democratic, and federalized Syria, and has been a key U.S. ally in fighting the Islamic State. It is opposed by Turkey, which views it as an extension of the PKK. In 2025, the SDF agreed to integrate into Syrian state institutions.
